autotaskBrandColorEnabled.title: Enable AES managed brand color
autotaskBrandColorEnabled.description: When true, AES applies the managed Autotask brand color. If omitted, AES enables managed branding whenever autotaskBrandColor is configured.

autotaskBrandColor.title: AES managed brand color
autotaskBrandColor.description: Company-wide AES branding color as a hex value, for example #b23a48 or b23a48.

autotaskLogoDataUrl.title: AES managed header logo
autotaskLogoDataUrl.description: Optional company-wide header logo as an SVG data URL. Example: data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg...%3E
